name: generation-eval-response-file-contract-smoke
description: Three-case fixture for testing the generation-eval response-file contract without model provider calls. This is not a benchmark or maturity coverage claim.

cases.prompt: Return a CogLang expression that checks whether 1 equals 1.
Return a CogLang expression that lists all visible graph nodes.
Return a CogLang expression that creates a Person entity named ada.
